mapper.select: SELECT NOTI_ID FROM NOTIFICATION_READ WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DISMISSED_YN = 'N'
SELECT NOTI_ID FROM NOTIFICATION_READ WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DISMISSED_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO NOTIFICATION_READ nr USING DUAL ON (nr.USER_ID = #{userId} AND nr.NOTI_ID = #{notiId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET DISMISSED_YN = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, NOTI_ID, DISMISSED_YN) VALUES (#{userId}, #{notiId}, 'Y')
